title: erythroxylum roigii
intro: Erythroxylum roigii, also known as the Cuban cocoa, is a species of flowering plant in the family Erythroxylaceae. It is native to Cuba and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing stress and anxiety, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Erythroxylum roigii can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often consumed in its raw form as a dietary supplement.
